section.div: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.
This gym provides implementations of various PDEs for easy testing and comparison of data-driven and classical PDE control algorithms.
